visual_observations.composition_style: digital event-collab graphic — three phone mockups displaying Sound Storm festival tickets with QR codes
props_visible: Three phone screen mockups showing Sound Storm Riyadh branded tickets
Hot pink CTA button 'امسح الرمز' (scan the code)

text_overlays.content_summary: تذكرة ميدل بيست الرياض ممكن تكون من نصيبك (A Middle Beast Riyadh ticket could be yours)

notable_visual_elements: Sound Storm festival branding — winged logo
Triple phone mockup creates urgency/abundance cue
Hot pink CTA buttons create strong visual contrast against dark green
Partnership between Barns Coffee and Sound Storm (Middle Beast) festival

cultural_notes.free_notes: Barns positions itself within Saudi's new entertainment economy (Sound Storm is the largest licensed music festival in Saudi Arabia). The giveaway format drives engagement through participation. 'ممكن تكون من نصيبك' (may be your share/luck) uses a culturally resonant phrase — نصيب refers to fate/destiny in Arabic culture.

pattern_matches.notes: Classic ticket giveaway format with QR scan mechanic
Official Barns x Sound Storm partnership — branded ticket as collab asset
Sound Storm is a signature Vision 2030 entertainment moment; Barns aligns brand with it
